title: berkheya pannosa
intro: Berkheya pannosa, also known as the yellow daisy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. Traditionally used in medicine, this plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Berkheya pannosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Berkheya pannosa can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for topical or internal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
